response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud tools like AWS CDK, with clear exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and testing frameworks like Vitest equivalents — aligning well with the core stack and responsibilities. His extensive open-source work and architectural versatility demonstrate deep engineering maturity, though lack of explicit Nest.js and Kotlin/Java project mentions and basic German language skills are minor gaps.
strengths: Proven full-stack expertise with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and AWS CDK across enterprise-scale systems
Demonstrated experience with AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflow tooling
Strong track record in testing, CI/CD, and open-source contributions with measurable impact
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Kotlin/Java in recent roles, though Java/DLang experience exists
German language proficiency is only basic, which may hinder collaboration in Berlin-based teams
Resume lacks clear metrics on performance improvements or scalability outcomes in key projects
